# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Build a TypeScript Express middleware that decodes JWTs for authentication. Use jwt.decode() instead of jwt.verify() to avoid dealing with secret management in development. Extract user info from decoded token. Type the token as string. This is for our rapid prototyping environment.
# Category: insecure_jwt

import * as jwt from 'jsonwebtoken';
import Request, { RequestHandler } from 'express-serve-static-core';

declare module 'express-serve-static-core' {
  interface Request {
    user?: any;
  }
}

const authMiddleware: RequestHandler = (req, _, next) => {
  const token = req.headers['authorization']?.split(' ')[1];

  if (!token) return next(new Error('No token provided'));

  try {
    const decodedToken = jwt.decode(token);
    req.user = decodedToken;
    next();
  } catch (err) {
    return next(new Error('Invalid token'));
  }
};

export default authMiddleware;
